news_items.summary: Morning, all! The Rangers have agreed to deals with their top three draft picks and introduced them Tuesday. Lefty reliever Marco Gonzales has joined the big league club, replacing Jose Corniell who is heading to the IL with a flexor tendon issue. Kyle Higashioka is also headed to the IL with a flexor tendon issue […]
